metaTitle: Travel Trailer Buying, Selling and Rentals | Clinique du VR
metaDescription: Clinique du VR buys, sells and rents travel trailers in Gatineau, with delivery options for Ottawa-area, Outaouais and nearby campgrounds within 200 km.

hero.title: Travel Trailer Buying, Selling and Rentals
hero.body: Clinique du VR offers carefully inspected pre-owned RV sales as well as travel trailer rentals based on your needs. Browse available units, ask about rental options and contact us to arrange delivery to the agreed site from Gatineau.

intro.title: Available trailers and services
intro.body: We offer straightforward support for RV buying, sales and rentals based on what you need.

cards.title: RV Buying
cards.body: We buy used trailers that need repairs, restoration or modernization. For an evaluation, you need to send complete photos, your city, known issues, and a photo of the RV information plate. We buy at low prices because we then invest in repairs, updates, and resale or rental preparation. The trailer must be registered in Quebec, the chassis must not be cracked, and requests with no real information will not be reviewed.

cards.title: RV Sales
cards.body: Our units for sale are inspected thoroughly, repaired as needed and checked to help ensure they are free from water intrusion. The goal is to offer a more reliable unit that feels more reassuring and better prepared for the road.

cards.title: RV Rentals
cards.body: Whether you need a trailer for a weekend escape or a stay lasting several weeks, our units are ready to go. We can deliver and place the trailer directly at the campground you choose anywhere within a 200 km radius of Gatineau to make the rental simpler, more convenient and hassle-free.

emptyState: No units are listed right now. Contact us directly to ask about travel trailers available for purchase, sale or rental.

contactCard.title: Questions about a trailer?
contactCard.body: Call, email or book a time with us to get more information about our travel trailers for purchase, sale or rental. We can also arrange delivery to the agreed site.

items.title: Jayco JAY FLIGHT 225MLS 2024
items.summary: Pre-owned inventory / Recreational vehicle Jayco JAY FLIGHT 225MLS 2024.
description: Jayco Jay Flight SLX 2024 – Model 225MLS. Comfort, reliability and room for your adventures.

The Jayco Jay Flight SLX 225MLS 2024 is a versatile travel trailer designed to offer a strong balance of residential comfort, build quality and towing ease. It is ideal for couples or small families thanks to its smart layout and warm interior feel.
From the moment you step inside, the living area feels bright and functional. The seating is comfortable for relaxing after a day outdoors, and the large windows bring in plenty of natural light.
The central kitchen is fully equipped for camping needs, with generous storage, practical work surfaces and modern appliances that make meal preparation easy.
The closed front bedroom provides true privacy, a comfortable bed, integrated storage and a calm place to rest after a day of travel or exploration.
The bathroom is complete and practical, with a shower, toilet, and sink for both weekend getaways and longer stays.

Like other Jayco trailers, the Jay Flight SLX 225MLS benefits from solid construction, effective insulation and durable materials designed for the road and changing seasons. The layout is also simple and intuitive for both new and experienced campers.
Why choose the Jay Flight SLX 225MLS 2024? It offers a spacious and functional layout, a warm modern interior, reliable and durable construction, and strong value for couples or small families.
